title: User Guides Screen: Verify Falcon Charge Stand is NOT listed as a sub-device
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
Tap 'User Guides' from the navigation menu.
Observe the list of sub-devices displayed on the User Guides screen.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' does NOT appear anywhere in the device list.
Verify that only legitimate Poly devices (e.g., headsets, speakerphones) are listed.
expected: The Falcon Charge Stand is NOT displayed on the User Guides screen. Only legitimate Poly devices (headsets, speakerphones) appear in the list.

title: User Guides Screen: Verify legitimate Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC appears as a sub-device
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
Tap 'User Guides' from the navigation menu.
Observe the list of sub-devices displayed on the User Guides screen.
Verify that 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' appears in the device list.
Tap on the 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' entry to open its user guide.
expected: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC is listed as a sub-device on the User Guides screen. Tapping it opens the corresponding user guide document.

title: User Guides Screen: App backgrounding and return — device list remains correct
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Verify the User Guides screen loads with a list of devices.
Press the Home button to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app from the recent apps list.
Observe the User Guides screen.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' is NOT present in the list.
Verify that legitimate Poly devices (e.g., headsets, speakerphones) are still listed.
expected: After backgrounding and returning to the app, the User Guides screen still correctly excludes the Falcon Charge Stand and shows only legitimate Poly devices.

title: User Guides Screen: App force-kill and relaunch — device list persists correctly
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Verify the User Guides screen loads with a list of devices.
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Observe the device list.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' is NOT present in the list.
Verify that legitimate Poly devices (e.g., headsets, speakerphones) are still listed.
expected: After force-kill and relaunch, the User Guides screen correctly excludes the Falcon Charge Stand and shows only legitimate Poly devices.

title: User Guides Screen: Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect — device list remains correct
steps: Connect a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Verify the device list is displayed.
Disconnect Bluetooth (turn off Bluetooth on the phone or disconnect the device).
Wait 5 seconds.
Reconnect Bluetooth (turn on Bluetooth and reconnect the device).
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' is NOT present in the list.
Verify that legitimate Poly devices (e.g., headsets, speakerphones) are still listed.
expected: After Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect, the User Guides screen correctly excludes the Falcon Charge Stand and shows only legitimate Poly devices.

title: User Guides Screen: Refresh behavior — pull-to-refresh or screen re-entry
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Observe the initial device list.
Note the devices displayed.
Navigate back to the main screen (tap back arrow or device name).
Re-navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Observe the device list after re-entry.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' is NOT present in the list on either the initial load or the re-entry.
Verify that the device list is consistent between the two views.
expected: On both initial load and re-entry to the User Guides screen, the Falcon Charge Stand is excluded. The device list is consistent across screen refreshes.

title: User Guides Screen: No device connected — verify empty/fallback state
steps: Ensure no Poly device is connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Observe the User Guides screen.
Verify that 'Falcon Charge Stand' is NOT present in any list or section.
Verify that the screen displays appropriate content (e.g., a list of all supported Poly devices, or a message indicating no device is connected but guides are available).
expected: When no device is connected, the User Guides screen does not show the Falcon Charge Stand. The screen displays appropriate fallback content (e.g., full list of supported devices or informational message).

title: User Guides Screen: Verify data source integrity — no accessory/charge stand devices listed
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Menu → User Guides.
Capture the full list of sub-devices displayed on the screen.
For each device in the list, verify it is a legitimate Poly headset or speakerphone model (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC, Poly Voyager 5200, Poly Sync 20, etc.).
Verify that no accessory-only items appear (e.g., 'Falcon Charge Stand', 'Charging Case', 'USB Adapter', 'Charging Stand').
expected: All items in the User Guides device list are legitimate Poly headsets or speakerphones. No accessory-only items (charge stands, cases, adapters) are present.
